rationale.oversight-explanation: Dependency visualization and previews reveal the context informing AI suggestions.
rationale.counterpoint: Opposes automation-maximalism, advocating augmentation and retained developer judgment.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and released a working open-source Lumen tool.
rationale.assistive: Developers initiate snippet-level assistance and remain within the authoring flow.
rationale.steering: Users inspect, select, and refine context before code generation.
rationale.risk-security: Security-compliance scenarios substantively motivate context-aware generation safeguards.
rationale.risk-quality: The tool mitigates missed dependencies, inconsistent patterns, and breaking changes.
